description: Inline modifier that fills a shape's interior with an image asset instead of a solid color, clipping the image to the shape boundary with an optional scale factor.
utility: Fill a shape with an image asset clipped to shape bounds

arguments.name: imageName
arguments.description: Name of the uploaded image asset in quotes - e.g., "tree", "star"

arguments.name: scale
arguments.description: Scale factor for the image, default 1. Positive number, e.g., 0.5, 0.8, 1.5

alternates.description: Fill shape with image at default scale
Fill shape with image scaled to 70%
Rectangle filled with a scaled image
Square filled with a scaled image
Point marker filled with an image

examples.scenario: Rectangle with tree image and thin stroke
Point along a line with image fill and notes
examples.expression: P = ratiopoint(G, L, r, fi("tree", 1), notes("You can write a long sentence here"))
